testcase.name: test_role_endpoints_schema_robustness[GET /api/v1/role/list]

failure.message:
schemathesis.core.failures.FailureGroup: Schemathesis found 2 distinct failures
- Server error
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 500 Documented: 200, 422
[500] Internal Server Error:
`Internal Server Error`
Reproduce with:
curl -X GET -H 'token: [Filtered]' 'http://localhost:9999/api/v1/role/list?role_name=&page_size=-12190991265276076&page=392'
(2 sub-exceptions)

testcase.failure: + Exception Group Traceback (most recent call last): | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/schemathesis/generation/hypothesis/builder.py", line 246, in test_role_endpoints_schema_robustness | def test_wrapper(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> Any: | ^^^ | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/hypothesis/core.py", line 2264, in wrapped_test | raise the_error_hypothesis_found | schemathesis.core.failures.FailureGroup: Schemathesis found 2 distinct failures | | - Server error | | - Undocumented HTTP status code | | Received: 500 | Documented: 200, 422 | | [500] Internal Server Error: | | `Internal Server Error` | | Reproduce with: | | curl -X GET -H 'token: [Filtered]' 'http://localhost:9999/api/v1/role/list?role_name=&page_size=-12190991265276076&page=392' | | (2 sub-exceptions) +-+---------------- 1 ---------------- | schemathesis.core.failures.ServerError: Server error +---------------- 2 ---------------- | schemathesis.openapi.checks.UndefinedStatusCode: Undocumented HTTP status code | | Received: 500 | Documented: 200, 422 +------------------------------------

testcase.name: test_role_endpoints_schema_robustness[GET /api/v1/role/get]
testcase.failure: + Exception Group Traceback (most recent call last): | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/schemathesis/generation/hypothesis/builder.py", line 246, in test_role_endpoints_schema_robustness | def test_wrapper(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> Any: | ^^^ | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/hypothesis/core.py", line 2184, in wrapped_test | _raise_to_user(errors, state.settings, [], " in explicit examples") | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/hypothesis/core.py", line 1656, in _raise_to_user | raise the_error_hypothesis_found | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/schemathesis/generation/hypothesis/builder.py", line 248, in test_wrapper | return test_function(*args, **kwargs) | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/schemathesis/schemas.py", line 346, in test_wrapper | return func(*args, **kwargs) | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/tests/fuzz/test_roles_fuzz.py", line 103, in test_role_endpoints_schema_robustness | case.call_and_validate(checks=_FUZZ_CHECKS) | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/schemathesis/generation/case.py", line 559, in call_and_validate | self.validate_response( | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/schemathesis/generation/case.py", line 525, in validate_response | raise FailureGroup(_failures, message) from None | schemathesis.core.failures.FailureGroup: Schemathesis found 1 distinct failure | | - Undocumented HTTP status code | | Received: 404 | Documented: 200, 422 | | [404] Not Found: | | `{"code":404,"msg":"Object has not found, exc: Object \"Role\" does not exist, query_params: role_id=0"}` | | Reproduce with: | | curl -X GET -H 'token: [Filtered]' 'http://localhost:9999/api/v1/role/get?role_id=0' | | (1 sub-exception) +-+---------------- 1 ---------------- | schemathesis.openapi.checks.UndefinedStatusCode: Undocumented HTTP status code | | Received: 404 | Documented: 200, 422 +------------------------------------

Undocumented HTTP status code | | Received: 400 | Documented: 200, 422 | | [400] Bad Request: | | `{"code":400,"msg":"The role with this rolename already exists in the system.","data":null}` | | Reproduce with: | | curl -X POST -H 'token: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name": "\u7ba1\u7406\u5458"}' http://localhost:9999/api/v1/role/create | | (1 sub-exception) +-+---------------- 1 ---------------- | schemathesis.openapi.checks.UndefinedStatusCode: Undocumented HTTP status code | | Received: 400 | Documented: 200, 422 +------------------------------------

testcase.name: test_role_endpoints_schema_robustness[POST /api/v1/role/update]

failure.message:
schemathesis.core.failures.FailureGroup: Schemathesis found 2 distinct failures
- Server error
- Undocumented HTTP status code
Received: 500 Documented: 200, 422
[500] Internal Server Error:
`Internal Server Error`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'token: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '[null, null]' http://localhost:9999/api/v1/role/update
(2 sub-exceptions)

testcase.failure: + Exception Group Traceback (most recent call last): | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/schemathesis/generation/hypothesis/builder.py", line 246, in test_role_endpoints_schema_robustness | def test_wrapper(*args: Any, **kwargs: Any) -> Any: | ^^^ | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/hypothesis/core.py", line 2184, in wrapped_test | _raise_to_user(errors, state.settings, [], " in explicit examples") | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/hypothesis/core.py", line 1656, in _raise_to_user | raise the_error_hypothesis_found | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/schemathesis/generation/hypothesis/builder.py", line 248, in test_wrapper | return test_function(*args, **kwargs) | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/schemathesis/schemas.py", line 346, in test_wrapper | return func(*args, **kwargs) | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/tests/fuzz/test_roles_fuzz.py", line 103, in test_role_endpoints_schema_robustness | case.call_and_validate(checks=_FUZZ_CHECKS) | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/schemathesis/generation/case.py", line 559, in call_and_validate | self.validate_response( | File "/Users/lvqingquan/pycharmProject/vue-fastapi-admin/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/schemathesis/generation/case.py", line 525, in validate_response | raise FailureGroup(_failures, message) from None | schemathesis.core.failures.FailureGroup: Schemathesis found 2 distinct failures | | -
